title: PIECE OF CAKE
overview: Frivolous Kazuki and stoic Rei take on a job at Christmas that will change their lives forever.

title: THE KISS OF DEATH
overview: The assassins' life with their new charge is no walk in the park... especially when a new job comes up!

title: SPICE OF LIFE
overview: The guys decide it's time to say goodbye to Miri as they take her back to her mother... but there'll be one last time on the playground first.

title: WHAT WILL BE, WILL BE
overview: Taking care of Miri is a full-time job, but the boys may have found their salvation: Daycare! But enrolling her won't be as easy as it looks...

title: CRUNCH TIME
overview: Despite their (eventual) daycare triumph, Miri's presence is putting a crimp on the buddies' finances. Looks like it's time to take on a few jobs...

title: LOVE IS BLIND
overview: Kazuki is determined to be a more attentive parent to Miri. But investigating a fight she got into at daycare might put him on her black list!

title: AFTER RAIN COMES FAIR WEATHER
overview: A change in season dredges up bad memories for Kazuki, who's already feeling overworked and unappreciated at home.

title: NOTHING SEEK, NOTHING FIND
overview: A trip home for Rei leads to an uncomfortable ultimatum issued by his hitman father. Meanwhile, Kazuki and Miri are preparing a surprise...

title: NO SWEET WITHOUT SWEAT
overview: When Miri's daycare holds a field day, each of the buddies work at encouraging her in their own way.

title: LOST AT SEA
overview: An unexpected encounter at the daycare leads Kazuki and Rei to seriously reconsider their guardianship of Miri.

title: EVERYONE WILL BE HYPOCRITES
overview: While adjusting to life without Miri, Kazuki and Rei find themselves facing a new challenge...

title: Daughter Daddies
overview: Miri sings at the Christmas party, while Kazuki and Rei decide to settle matters with the organization.
